description: Fetch Substack trending content: global trending topics (AI-powered topic clusters covering tech, business, politics, etc.) or category leaderboards (top authors/publications ranked by paid/trending/free status across 32 categories). Returns ranked items with rich metadata including descriptions, categories, prediction market links, trending timestamps, and recent discussion users. No login required.

parameters.name: tab
parameters.description: Content mode: 'explore' for global trending topics, or a category ID (e.g. '4'=Technology, '62'=Business, '118'=Crypto) for category leaderboard

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's nextCursor field
